evidence_quotes.quote: to force merchant companies not to sell certain products as long as they are entirely legal.
The other point that could be added is the “Stop Killing Games” initiative, which would allow buyers to have guarantees of possessions of the digital goods they buy.

paragraphs.text: This initiative is a good start, but a point that should be added will allow VISA/Mastercard companies to play their huge market share in order to force merchant companies not to sell certain products as long as they are entirely legal. This type of practice is anti-democratic and has the potential to drift towards widespread censorship. The other point that could be added is the “Stop Killing Games” initiative, which would allow buyers to have guarantees of possessions of the digital goods they buy.
